name: Agent World Network
description: Agent World Network — world-scoped agent discovery and communication for OpenClaw

agent_name.description: Human-readable name for this agent instance, shared with peers during discovery (e.g. "Alice's coder")

peer_port.description: Local port for the P2P peer server (HTTP)

quic_port.description: Local port for the QUIC/UDP transport (optional fast transport)

advertise_address.description: Public IP or DNS name to advertise for the QUIC/UDP transport when the listener is bound to a different local interface

advertise_port.description: Public UDP port to advertise for the QUIC/UDP transport when it differs from the local listener port

data_dir.description: Directory to store identity and peer data (default: ~/.openclaw/awn)

tofu_ttl_days.description: Days before a TOFU public-key binding expires and is re-verified on next contact (default 7)
